prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）位于深圳市，属一线城市异地校区，对长三角考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在江苏招生占比近年约3–4%，属外省招生重点省份之 一；计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为2024–2026年高热推荐专业，社会报考热度持续攀升；江苏物理类考生数从2021年16.6万持续增长至2025年26.1万， 2026年总考生52.1万，按近年物理类占比约73%估算约38万人，较2025年增长约46%，竞争基数显著扩大；省控线物理类本科批从2021年417分稳步升至2025年463分，整体竞争环境 趋紧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2414名、2026年大幅扩招86%的缓解效应、江苏物理类考生大增46%的竞争加剧、学校顶尖层次与专业高热度的持续吸引力，扩招带来的 位次后移被考生规模扩张和报考热度部分抵消；预测2026年物理类最低位次约3455名，区间3040–3870名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics category was approximately 3130 → 3004 → 2577 → 2296 → 2414. From 2021 to 2024, it continuously moved forward (from 3130 to 2296), and in 2025, it slightly moved back to 2414. The fluctuation in the past two years is about 118 places, remaining in a high-competition range. The Physics category enrollment plan was 42 students in 2021–2022, 35 in 2023–2024, and 28 in 2025, showing a year-on-year reduction trend. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 52 students, an increase of about 86% compared to 2025, which theoretically could alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, sharing the reputation of HIT's main campus. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it ranks 12th (main campus), belonging to the top national engineering institutions, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 10th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 4.53 million, high short video exposure, and sustained high application attention. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission line, but it stabilized in 2025. Relying on the disciplinary strength of HIT's main campus, it has 4 A+ disciplines: Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering, as well as A-level disciplines like Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, and Civil Engineering, which highly match the popular engineering majors offered at the Shenzhen campus, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is located in Shenzhen, a first-tier city's satellite campus, which has strong regional appeal to candidates from the Yangtze River Delta. The proportion of enrollment in Jiangsu has been about 3–4% in recent years, making it one of the key provinces for out-of-province enrollment. Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all high-heat recommended majors for 2024–2026, with continuously rising social application heat. The number of Physics category candidates in Jiangsu has grown from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025. In 2026, the total number of candidates is 521,000, and estimated at about 380,000 based on the recent Physics category proportion of about 73%, an increase of about 46% compared to 2025, significantly expanding the competition base. The provincial control line for Physics undergraduate batch has steadily risen from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, indicating a tightening competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2414, the mitigating effect of a significant 86% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition from a 46% increase in Jiangsu Physics candidates, and the sustained attraction of the university's top tier and popular majors, the ranking decline due to expansion is partially offset by the expansion of the candidate pool and application heat. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics category in 2026 will be approximately 3455, with a range of 3040–3870.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Energy Excellence Joint Training Class) (Materials Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, Engineering Mechanics)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Excellence Joint Training Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future City Excellence Joint Training Class) (Civil Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Chemistry, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3040–3870, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Future Energy/Mathematics) as the main application direction. Tier 1 Computer Science/Artificial Intelligence can be a reach, and Tier 3 Civil/Environmental can be a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (within 3040), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship Computer Science majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1092 → 987 → 1242 → 1260 → 2130. There was a slight forward shift from 2021 to 2022, stability around 1240 from 2023 to 2024, and a significant backward shift in 2025 to 2130 (870 places behind 2024), showing notable fluctuation. Enrollment plans for History Category were 3 students from 2021 to 2022, 8 from 2023 to 2024, and expanded to 17 in 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, placing it at the national top tier, with strong brand appeal for History Category candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 10th (high heat), with comprehensive high heat and sustained application attention. History Category has few majors (Economics and Management Experimental Class, Architecture Class) with no abnormal filing records. The Economics and Management Experimental Class corresponds to Business Administration (A) and Applied Economics (A-); the Architecture Class corresponds to Architecture (A-), both being advantageous disciplines of HIT, with strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Shenzhen campus has strong regional appeal for History Category candidates from the Yangtze River Delta. Although its History Category enrollment in Jiangsu is small, it has been continuously expanding in recent years, reflecting attention to Jiangsu student sources. Social popularity for Economics and Management/Business Administration is divided and wait-and-see, while Architecture is also divided and wait-and-see. The number of History Category candidates in Jiangsu fluctuated from 95,000 in 2021 to 97,000 in 2025. In 2026, total candidates are 521,000, with an estimated History Category proportion of about 27%, approximately 140,000 people, an increase of about 45% compared to 2025, significantly expanding the competition base. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch rose from 476 in 2021 to 482 in 2025, overall stable with a slight increase.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2130, the 2026 plan remaining unchanged, a 45% increase in Jiangsu History Category candidates intensifying competition, and the sustained appeal of the university's top tier and advantageous disciplines, the 2025 ranking has already shifted significantly backward, and the expansion of candidate numbers in 2026 will further push the ranking upward. The predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2180, with a range of 1918–2442.
